offer: For Shopify store owners processing 5–15 invoices/month, missed renewals cause cash flow gaps. We notify finance ops of upcoming renewals instead of manual tracking of subscriptions in spreadsheets.
problem: Managing recurring subscription expenses and renewals
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Shopify store owners
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to Shopify store owners with demo video
Share in community forums for Shopify store owners
try_it: Let users try Subscription expense tracking and Renewal notifications on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
